checks.applied_rule: Eight pricing variants remain configuration_extension, manifest=false, foundry=false.

source_basis: 6B.02 maintains product price histories with effective dates
0_business_logic price changes use effective date ranges

source_basis: 6B.07 optional per channel; gateway enforcement mandatory
No module may bypass Communication Gateway
checks.applied_rule: Receive/setup surfaces do not carry ADL-004; email_shared_inbox is accepted human send surface and carries outbound gateway ADL-004.

source_basis: 6B.10 payment callbacks use provider event/transaction identity
Provider callbacks/top-ups/refunds use provider scope; allocation/manual reconciliation are downstream/manual surfaces
checks.applied_rule: Provider/API surfaces consume API-key scope; allocation balance and manual reconciliation do not.

source_basis: User v11 instruction: phase_doc_required may remain raw provenance only, never final hard basis
